result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  azurepipelinetool [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  cpu-info                  Get CPU info
  fetch-tool                Fetch tool (ninja, cmake, etc.)
  patch-dllimport           Patch dllimport in an assembly bytecode
  untgz                     Unarchive content of .tar.gz file
  unzip                     Unarchive content of .zip file
  unzip-blob                Unarchive content of Azure Blob
  unzip-url                 Unarchive content of a web file
  vsenv                     Setup VisualStudio environment variables
  winsdkenv                 Setup WindowsSDK environment variables
  xcode-setbuildsystemtype  Patch XCode build system workspace property
  zip                       Archive folder into .zip file
  zip-to-blob               Archive folder into .zip Azure Blob

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:
  azurepipelinetool [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  cpu-info                  Get CPU info
  fetch-tool                Fetch tool (ninja, cmake, etc.)
  patch-dllimport           Patch dllimport in an assembly bytecode
  untgz                     Unarchive content of .tar.gz file
  unzip                     Unarchive content of .zip file
  unzip-blob                Unarchive content of Azure Blob
  unzip-url                 Unarchive content of a web file
  vsenv                     Setup VisualStudio environment variables
  winsdkenv                 Setup WindowsSDK environment variables
  xcode-setbuildsystemtype  Patch XCode build system workspace property
  zip                       Archive folder into .zip file
  zip-to-blob               Archive folder into .zip Azure Blob

result.stdout:
Description:
  Get CPU info

Usage:
  azurepipelinetool cpu-info [options]

Options:
  -i, --info <Arch|Count>    CPU property
  -v, --variable <variable>  Environment variable to set
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

Options:
  -i, --info <Arch|Count>    CPU property
  -v, --variable <variable>  Environment variable to set
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Fetch tool (ninja, cmake, etc.)

Usage:
  azurepipelinetool fetch-tool [options]

Options:
  -n, --name <Butler|CCache|CMake|Ninja|None>  Tool name
  -o, --output <output>                        Output folder
  -t, --temp <temp>                            Temp folder or file name
  -v, --version <version>                      Version
  --overwrite                                  Overwrite files
  -p, --path                                   Add to PATH
  -?, -h, --help                               Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Patch dllimport in an assembly bytecode

Usage:
  azurepipelinetool patch-dllimport [options]

Options:
  -i, --input <input>          Input assembly
  -o, --output <output>        Output assembly
  -v, --new-value <new-value>  New value
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Unarchive content of .tar.gz file

Usage:
  azurepipelinetool untgz [options]

Options:
  -i, --input <input>          Input file
  -o, --output <output>        Output folder
  --overwrite                  Overwrite files
  -r, --root-path <root-path>  Root path to skip
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Unarchive content of .zip file

Usage:
  azurepipelinetool unzip [options]

Options:
  -i, --input <input>          Input file
  -f, --filter <filter>        Filter regex
  -o, --output <output>        Output folder
  --overwrite                  Overwrite files
  -r, --root-path <root-path>  Root path to skip
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Unarchive content of Azure Blob

Usage:
  azurepipelinetool unzip-blob [options]

Options:
  -o, --output <output>                    Output folder
  -f, --filter <filter>                    Filter regex
  -n, --blob-name <blob-name>              Output blob name
  --connection-string <connection-string>  Connection string
  -c, --container-name <container-name>    Container name
  -t, --temp <temp>                        Temp folder or file name
  --overwrite                              Overwrite files
  -r, --root-path <root-path>              Root path to skip
  -?, -h, --help                           Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Unarchive content of a web file

Usage:
  azurepipelinetool unzip-url [options]

Options:
  -o, --output <output>          Output folder
  -f, --filter <filter>          Filter regex
  -u, --url <url>                URL
  -t, --temp <temp>              Temp folder or file name
  --overwrite                    Overwrite files
  -r, --root-path <root-path>    Root path to skip
  --archive-type <auto|tgz|zip>  Archive type
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Archive folder into .zip file

Usage:
  azurepipelinetool zip [options]

Options:
  -i, --input <input>                                                   Input folder
  -f, --filter <filter>                                                 Filter regex
  -o, --output <output>                                                 Output file
  -l, --compression-level <Fastest|NoCompression|Optimal|SmallestSize>  Compression level
  -?, -h, --help                                                        Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Archive folder into .zip Azure Blob

Usage:
  azurepipelinetool zip-to-blob [options]

Options:
  -i, --input <input>                                                   Input folder
  -f, --filter <filter>                                                 Filter regex
  -n, --blob-name <blob-name>                                           Output blob name
  --connection-string <connection-string>                               Connection string
  -c, --container-name <container-name>                                 Container name
  -l, --compression-level <Fastest|NoCompression|Optimal|SmallestSize>  Compression level
  -t, --temp <temp>                                                     Temp folder or file name
  --overwrite                                                           Overwrite blob
  -?, -h, --help                                                        Show help and usage information
